## SUBJECT LINE

Subject: Pre-K is coming, here's the gap you can still close

- Character count: 47 ✅ (under 50)
- Formula: Observation hook + Direct Benefit hybrid 
- Key message in first 30 characters: "Pre-K is coming, here's", establishes relevance immediately ✅
- Pre-K reference appropriate for L1 
- No spam trigger words ✅

---

## PREVIEW TEXT

Preview: You bought the Body-Signal underwear 90 days ago. If you paused, here's why that might have been exactly right for your child.

- Length: 130 characters, visible on desktop, truncated on mobile but key message ("You bought the Body-Signal underwear 90 days ago.") fits in first 40 chars ✅
- Complements subject line without repeating it ✅
- No spam triggers ✅

---

## FROM

From Name: Lena from BrightKidCo
From Email: support@brightkidco.com
Profile Subtitle: Customer Support · Mom of two autistic sons

---

sections.name: HOOK
sections.content:
> It's been 90 days since you first tried the Body-Signal underwear.
>
> Maybe your child wore them for a week, then pushed them away. Maybe you put them in a drawer after a few accidents, thinking "we'll try again later." Maybe nothing noticeable happened, and you weren't sure if anything was supposed to.
>
> If any of that sounds familiar, that's normal. And that's okay.

---

sections.name: VALIDATION
sections.content:
> Here's what we know from watching thousands of families: the interoception pathway is not a light switch. It's a slow bridge. Some kids cross it in two weeks. Some take months. Many need breaks, their nervous systems get overwhelmed by the new sensation, and stepping back is a self-regulation signal, not a failure.
>
> You didn't do anything wrong. Your child didn't fail. The body-signal learning layer was doing its job, it was giving the nervous system information it had never received before. Sometimes that information takes a while to decode.

---

sections.name: MECHANISM (Body-Signal Refresher)
sections.content:
> The Body-Signal Learning Layer works by creating a gentle, sustained wetness sensation, 30 to 60 seconds of feedback that gives a nervous system that picks up signals slowly time to register: *something happened.*
>
> Pull-ups wick that signal away in seconds. Regular underwear doesn't create enough of it. The three-layer design is calibrated specifically for autistic children whose brains process body signals on a different frequency.
>
> When a child stops wearing them, whether after a week or a month, that learning pause is real, but it's not permanent. The neural pathways that started forming don't disappear. They just go dormant.
>
> Starting again isn't starting over.

---

sections.name: SOCIAL PROOF
sections.content:
> *"We bought the 3+3 bundle and the first two weeks were rough. He'd wear them for an hour then ask to take them off. I almost gave up. Then at week three, he paused mid-play, looked down, and walked to the potty. He didn't make it in time, but that pause had NEVER happened before. We're still at it, but now I know something IS happening in there."*
>
>, L1 mom, verified BrightKidCo review

> *"Pre-K was 4 months away. After 90 days of wearing them inconsistently, something clicked. It wasn't overnight. But he started telling me AFTER instead of me finding out. That was the first sign."*
>
>, Sarah, verified BrightKidCo review

---

sections.name: PRODUCT INTRO
sections.content:
> The 3+3 Bundle is still the best place to restart:
>
> • 6 pairs, enough for daily rotation plus laundry buffer
> • 3-layer design, cotton inner (gentle signal), smart absorption (protects without masking), outer barrier (leak-resistant)
> • Free shipping included
> • $79.99, or try 1 Pair for $34.99 if you want to test before committing
>
> Use code WELCOME10 at checkout for 10% off your restart order.

---

sections.name: GUARANTEE
sections.content:
> 60-Day Guarantee. Try the underwear again at your own pace. If your child hasn't shown progress, or if you decide it's not the right time, full refund. No questions. No returns hassle. Your judgment.

")

 is the ★★★★★★ strongest lever for L1)
